slides.title: Boards & Case Management
slides.subtitle: Visual kanban boards for tickets, cases, and work tracking

slides.title: What are Kissflow Boards?
bullets: Kanban-style visual boards for case and ticket management
Cards represent work items; columns represent stages/statuses
Customizable fields, views, filters, and assignment rules
Available on Basic and Enterprise plans
Standalone boards or embedded in Kissflow Apps
Complement processes — boards for ongoing work, processes for approvals
slides.notes: When to use boards vs processes — key decision point.

slides.title: Board Builder
bullets: Define columns (stages) — Open, In Progress, On Hold, Resolved, Closed
Configure card fields — title, description, priority, assignee, due date
Custom fields: dropdown, date, user, attachment, and more
Column rules — auto-assign, WIP limits, required fields per column
Card templates for consistent data capture
Board settings: permissions, notifications, and SLA configuration
slides.notes: Demo building an IT helpdesk board.

slides.title: Working with Board Cards
bullets: Create cards manually or via automation/integration
Drag and drop cards between columns to update status
Assign cards to users or groups
Add comments, attachments, and activity history
Filter and search cards by any field value
Bulk update — move, assign, or close multiple cards
slides.notes: Show card detail view and drag-drop between columns.

slides.title: SLA and Assignment Rules
bullets: Define SLA targets per column or priority level
Visual indicators for approaching and breached SLAs
Auto-assignment rules based on category, skill, or round-robin
Escalation notifications when SLA is breached
Business hours configuration for SLA calculations
SLA reports for team performance tracking
slides.notes: SLAs are critical for helpdesk and support boards.

slides.title: AI Board Creation
bullets: Describe your board requirements in natural language
AI generates columns, fields, and board structure
Refine with visual board editor after generation
Accelerates setup from hours to minutes
Iterate on AI output — add columns, fields, and rules
Reference kissflow.com AI Board Creation capability
slides.notes: Demo AI board creation if available in environment.

items.label: Helpdesk
items.desc: Internal IT and HR support tickets

slides.title: Boards in Apps
bullets: Embed board component on app pages
Filter board view by user, team, or category at page level
Combine board with process components on same page
Initiate process from board card for escalation workflows
Board reports embedded alongside board view
Role-based board visibility within app navigation
slides.notes: Show app page with board + related process side by side.

slides.title: Board Reports
bullets: Create reports from board card data
Track volume, resolution time, and SLA compliance
Charts: cards by status, assignee workload, trend over time
Export for management reporting
Schedule automated delivery to team leads
Embed board reports on app dashboard pages
slides.notes: Board reporting mirrors process reporting capabilities.

slides.title: Boards Best Practices
bullets: Limit columns to 5-7 for clarity — too many columns confuse users
Define clear column entry/exit criteria
Use priority and SLA fields consistently across the team
Review and archive resolved cards regularly
Train team on drag-drop and card field requirements
Link to processes only when formal approval is needed
